projectDescription: Woblar builds and deploys custom AI Agents for South African SMBs, automating lead capture, appointment booking, customer support, and retail analytics across WhatsApp, web chat, and Instagram.
keyFeatures: 24/7 AI-powered lead capture and qualification across WhatsApp, web chat, and Instagram
Conversational appointment booking with calendar sync and automated reminders
Tier-1 customer support automation trained on proprietary business knowledge
Retail Vision Engine — computer vision analytics from existing CCTV cameras
Predictive staffing and inventory forecasting from POS and ERP data
Automated data entry and invoice processing for finance teams
Custom AI training on business-specific pricing, products, and tone of voice
POPIA-compliant data handling and anonymous-only retail analytics
